nodes.title: EmbedLayer: customer-facing analytics platform
nodes.description:
Top-level epic tracking V1, V2, and V3 of EmbedLayer per embedlayer_v1_v3_technical_plan.md.

Goal: a customer-facing analytics platform SaaS companies embed into their own apps, backed by Laravel + Livewire control plane, Svelte/TypeScript embeddable runtime, an internal structured semantic layer, and external semantic-provider adapters (Cube, dbt SL).

Non-negotiable principles:
- No SQLGlot / no runtime SQL parsing.
- Chart builder works on semantic fields, not SQL.
- Every backend is a SemanticProvider.
- Runtime is backend-agnostic; tenant policies are server-side.

nodes.title: V1: prove embedded governed analytics end-to-end
nodes.description:
Smallest version that proves: connect a data source, define governed metrics/dimensions, build dashboards, embed into a host app, enforce tenant isolation, render customer-facing analytics.

Do NOT build in V1: AI, Cube/dbt adapters, NL queries, arbitrary SQL fields, complex join graphs, pre-aggregations, polished drag-drop builder, advanced cache engine. (Plan §14, §21)

nodes.title: V2: framework-neutral embed + external semantic providers + governance
nodes.description: Web-component runtime, Cube adapter, dbt Semantic Layer adapter, stronger caching, versioning/publish workflow, governance. (Plan §15)

nodes.title: V3: governed analytics application platform (AI, NL, pre-aggs, multi-provider)
nodes.description: AI-assisted model/dashboard creation, NL → SemanticQuery, pre-aggregations, multi-provider dashboards, metric testing, anomaly detection. AI is suggestion-only; validation stays deterministic. (Plan §16)

nodes.title: M0: foundations — app/Analytics scaffold, base tables, credential vault
nodes.description: Cross-cutting foundations every other V1 milestone depends on: namespace scaffold per plan §3, org/project tables, embedlayer config, CredentialVault service. Not a milestone in the plan but breaking it out keeps M1 unblocked from a single huge task.

nodes.title: M1: core Laravel domain (migrations, models, actions, policies, factories)
nodes.description:
Plan §14.3 M1. Deliverables: projects, data_sources, semantic_providers, semantic_models, measures, dimensions, joins, dashboards, charts, embeds.

Exit criteria: migrations + factories + policies exist; base Livewire pages exist; domain actions covered by tests.

nodes.title: M2: data source connectivity (Postgres, MySQL, one warehouse)
nodes.description:
Plan §14.3 M2 + §9. Deliverables: Postgres + MySQL + (BigQuery OR Snowflake) connectors, credential encryption, connection testing, schema introspection.

Exit criteria: user can connect, test, view discovered tables/columns; failed connection returns safe error.

nodes.title: M3: internal semantic modeling (measures, dimensions, joins, policies)
nodes.description:
Plan §14.3 M3. Deliverables: model/measure/dimension/join/access-policy builders + model validator + preview query.

Exit criteria: user can define orders model + revenue/count measures + country/status/date dimensions; preview works; invalid fields rejected pre-execution.

nodes.title: M4: deterministic query compiler (no SQLGlot)
nodes.description:
Plan §14.3 M4 + §8. Deliverables: SqlDialect contract + Postgres/MySQL/warehouse dialects + InternalQueryCompiler + FieldValidator + AccessPolicyCompiler.

Exit criteria: SemanticQuery compiles to parameterized SQL; tenant policy injected; unsupported grain/field/filter throws typed exception; generated SQL snapshot-tested per dialect.

nodes.title: M5: dashboard builder (Livewire) + chart types
nodes.description:
Plan §14.3 M5. Deliverables: dashboard/chart CRUD, chart query builder, chart preview, layout persistence; chart types: number_card, bar_chart, line_chart, table.

Exit criteria: user can build a dashboard with all four chart types; dashboard preview uses the same query pipeline as embed mode; chart cannot access fields not allowed by its model.

nodes.title: M6: embedding (token, iframe route, embed API, pipeline)
nodes.description:
Plan §14.3 M6 + §10 + §11. Deliverables: embed config + allowed domains + token gen + iframe route + embed API + QueryExecutionPipeline with tenant enforcement.

Exit criteria: external app loads iframe dashboard with valid token; expired/invalid/wrong-domain tokens fail; tenant context enforced; queries respect external account ID.

nodes.title: M7: minimal Svelte/TypeScript embedded runtime
nodes.description:
Plan §14.3 M7 + §12. Deliverables: chart renderer, dashboard loader, filter state, loading/error states, theme config; ships inside the iframe initially.

Exit criteria: runtime renders dashboard in iframe; calls Laravel embed API; runtime does NOT know provider type; runtime accepts only token + dashboardId.

nodes.title: V1 caching by semantic-query hash
nodes.description: Plan §14.2. Cache result by hash(org_id, project_id, external_account_id, chart_id, query); TTL default 5min; per-chart TTL; CheckCache/StoreResultCache pipes. No pre-aggregation in V1.

nodes.title: V1 observability: query_runs + duration + cache hit/miss
nodes.description: Plan §19. Persist analytics_query_runs from V1: provider type, dashboard/chart id, tenant id, status, duration, cache hit, error type, timeout flag. No raw bindings unless privacy model exists.

nodes.title: V1 security & credential hygiene
nodes.description: Plan §11.3, §17.4. Encrypted creds at rest, never exposed to runtime; least-privilege docs; rotation support; audit connection tests & query runs; don't log sensitive bindings.

nodes.title: Scaffold app/Analytics namespace per plan §3
nodes.description: Create app/Analytics with Actions/, DataSources/, Semantic/, Compiler/, Pipelines/, Security/, Support/ subtrees as laid out in §3. Add empty `.gitkeep`s where needed and a single namespace README pointing to the plan.
nodes.acceptance: Directory tree matches §3 of embedlayer_v1_v3_technical_plan.md. composer dump-autoload finds App\Analytics namespace cleanly.

nodes.title: Create config/embedlayer.php with signing key, drivers, defaults
nodes.description: Add config/embedlayer.php exposing: embed_signing_key (env), default_ttl_seconds (300), enabled_drivers (postgres, mysql, bigquery|snowflake), enabled_providers (internal), default_row_limit, default_query_timeout_ms, allowed_origins. Read in config/services.php style.
nodes.acceptance: config('embedlayer.embed_signing_key') resolves from .env; values used by EmbedTokenManager and pipeline pipes.

nodes.title: Organizations, projects, teams base migrations + models
nodes.description: Migrations for organizations, teams, analytics_projects with ULID primary keys; Eloquent models + factories. All later analytics tables FK organization_id and project_id onto these.
nodes.acceptance: Migrations run on a clean db; Organization, Team, AnalyticsProject models + factories pass a smoke test.

nodes.title: CredentialVault service (encrypt/decrypt + key rotation hooks)
nodes.description: App\Analytics\Security\CredentialVault wraps Laravel Crypt with: encryptDataSourceConfig(array), decryptDataSourceConfig(DataSource), encryptProviderConfig(array), decryptProviderConfig(SemanticProvider). Keys come from config/embedlayer; supports key rotation by re-encrypting on save.
nodes.acceptance: Pest test: round-trip encrypt/decrypt; rotation re-encrypts existing rows; raw DB column never readable as plaintext.

nodes.title: Migration: analytics_data_sources (§4.2)
nodes.description: ULID id, org FK, name, driver, encrypted_config json, capabilities json nullable, last_introspected_schema json nullable, last_tested_at, last_introspected_at, timestamps, idx(org, driver). Verbatim from §4.2.
nodes.acceptance: Migration matches §4.2; rollback clean.

nodes.title: Migration: analytics_semantic_providers (§4.3)
nodes.description: ULID id, org FK, name, type ('internal'|'cube'|'dbt_semantic_layer'), nullable data_source_id FK, encrypted_config, capabilities json, idx(org,type).
nodes.acceptance: Matches §4.3; data_source_id nullable so external providers (Cube/dbt) don't require a data source.

nodes.title: Migration: analytics_semantic_models (§4.4)
nodes.description: ULID id, org FK, semantic_provider_id FK cascade, name, label, description, base_table, base_table_alias, is_enabled, version int default 1, unique(provider_id, name).
nodes.acceptance: Matches §4.4.

nodes.title: Migration: analytics_measures (§4.5)
nodes.description: Per §4.5: name, label, description, type (count|count_distinct|sum|avg|min|max|ratio|calculated), column, expression json, filters json, format (currency|percent|number|duration), is_public, unique(model_id,name).
nodes.acceptance: Matches §4.5; calculated metrics reference other measures by name in `expression` JSON (no SQL fragments).

nodes.title: Migration: analytics_dimensions (§4.6)
nodes.description: type (string|number|boolean|time), column, table_alias nullable, is_filterable/is_groupable/is_public, allowed_time_grains json nullable, unique(model_id,name).
nodes.acceptance: Matches §4.6.

nodes.title: Migration: analytics_joins (§4.7) — explicit, limited
nodes.description: left_table_alias, left_column, right_table, right_table_alias, right_column, type (inner|left default left), relationship (one_to_one|many_to_one|one_to_many). V1 strongly prefers many_to_one fact→dimension joins.
nodes.acceptance: Matches §4.7.

nodes.title: Migration: analytics_access_policies (§4.8)
nodes.description: Per-model rules json, is_required default true.
nodes.acceptance: Matches §4.8. is_required=true on tenant_isolation policy enforced by compiler tests.

nodes.title: Migrations: dashboards, dashboard_tabs, charts, chart_queries, chart_layouts
nodes.description: Per §4.1 list. Charts ref dashboard + model + chart type (number_card|bar_chart|line_chart|table). chart_queries stores the SemanticQuery JSON. chart_layouts stores grid coords/sizes.
nodes.acceptance: All five tables exist with FKs and indices.

nodes.title: Migrations: embeds, embed_domains, embed_tokens
nodes.description: Embeds: dashboard FK, name, default TTL, theme JSON. embed_domains: embed FK, host (no wildcards V1). embed_tokens: embed FK, jti, expires_at, external_account_id, payload hash for revocation/audit.
nodes.acceptance: Tables created; jti unique.

nodes.title: Migrations: analytics_query_runs, analytics_query_cache_entries
nodes.description: query_runs per §19 (provider_type, model_name, dashboard/chart FK, status enum, duration_ms, cache_hit, query_shape json, error_message). cache_entries per §15.5 schema but in V1 (organization FK, cache_key unique, result json, metadata json, expires_at, last_accessed_at, idx(org, expires_at)).
nodes.acceptance: Both tables created.

nodes.title: Eloquent models + factories for every analytics_* table
nodes.description: Models: DataSource, SemanticProvider, SemanticModel, Measure, Dimension, Join, AccessPolicy, Dashboard, DashboardTab, Chart, ChartQuery, ChartLayout, Embed, EmbedDomain, EmbedToken, QueryRun, QueryCacheEntry. Each with belongsTo/hasMany + a factory + ULID generation.
nodes.acceptance: Each model has factory; factory pest test creates+persists a tree from org → dashboard → chart.

nodes.title: Authorization policies (organization scoping)
nodes.description: Laravel Policies for DataSource, SemanticModel, Dashboard, Embed: every action scoped to user.organization_id == model.organization_id. Used by Livewire screens and embed APIs.
nodes.acceptance: Pest tests: a user from org A cannot view/edit org B records.

nodes.title: Skeleton domain Actions per §3 (CRUD + factories of intent)
nodes.description: Create skeletons for: CreateDataSource, TestDataSourceConnection, IntrospectDataSource, CreateSemanticModel, AddMeasureToModel, AddDimensionToModel, AddJoinToModel, ValidateSemanticModel, CreateDashboard, AddChartToDashboard, PublishDashboard, GenerateEmbedToken, ResolveEmbedContext, RunSemanticQuery, CompileInternalSemanticQuery. Wire DI in a Service Provider. Real logic comes in later milestones.
nodes.acceptance: All actions classloadable; each has at least a Pest stub asserting the public signature.

nodes.title: DataSourceConnector contract + DTOs (§9.1)
nodes.description: App\Analytics\DataSources\Contracts\DataSourceConnector with testConnection(), introspect(), execute(CompiledQuery), capabilities(). DTOs: ConnectionTestResult, SchemaCatalog (+ Table/Column catalogs), DataSourceCapabilities (supportsSql, supportsJoins, supportsDateTrunc, supportedTimeGrains, dialect).
nodes.acceptance: Contract + DTOs land; manager DataSourceConnectorManager::forDataSource(DataSource) resolves to a connector by driver.

nodes.title: PostgresConnector (§9.2)
nodes.description: Implement PostgresConnector exactly as §9.2: dynamic config(["database.connections.analytics_{id}" => ...]), DB::connection(), select against information_schema for introspect, capabilities supportsSql/Joins/DateTrunc=true.
nodes.acceptance: Integration test against a docker Postgres: testConnection() ok, introspect() returns expected schema rows, execute() runs a parameterized SELECT.

nodes.title: MySqlConnector
nodes.description: Mirror PostgresConnector for MySQL. introspect() uses information_schema.columns. Capabilities: supportsDateTrunc=false (use DATE_FORMAT in MySqlDialect).
nodes.acceptance: Integration test against docker MySQL 8 mirrors Postgres connector test.

nodes.title: DECISION: BigQuery vs Snowflake for V1 warehouse
nodes.description: Pick ONE warehouse for V1. Trade-offs: BigQuery (service account JSON, free tier easier for OSS demos, dialect more divergent) vs Snowflake (account/role/warehouse/user, more enterprise-y, paid only). Plan §14.2 explicitly says ONE of the two in V1.
nodes.acceptance: Decision recorded in this issue's notes + README; m2-warehouse-conn and m4-warehouse-dialect tasks updated to match.

nodes.title: Warehouse connector (BigQuery OR Snowflake — per decision)
nodes.description: Implement the connector chosen in m2-warehouse-decision. Encrypted creds via CredentialVault. introspect() must populate SchemaCatalog the same way the SQL connectors do.
nodes.acceptance: Either mocked (acceptable for V1 per §18.3) or live integration test covers testConnection / introspect / execute.

nodes.title: IntrospectDataSource action — persist schema catalog
nodes.description: Runs connector.introspect(), serializes SchemaCatalog → analytics_data_sources.last_introspected_schema; stamps last_introspected_at; emits a domain event.
nodes.acceptance: After running, DataSource row has populated last_introspected_schema; idempotent on repeat.

nodes.title: TestDataSourceConnection action with safe error redaction
nodes.description: Action wraps connector.testConnection() and translates raw exceptions into a sanitized ConnectionTestResult (no host:port leakage in error.message). Per §17.4 / §14.2 'failed connection returns safe error message'.
nodes.acceptance: Pest: invalid creds produce ConnectionTestResult::failed with a non-leaky message.

nodes.title: Query timeout + default row limit enforcement at connector layer
nodes.description: Set per-connection statement_timeout (Postgres), max_execution_time (MySQL), job timeout (warehouse). Inject default row limit from config if SemanticQuery has none. Surface QueryTimeoutException.
nodes.acceptance: Test that triggers a long sleep aborts within the configured timeout and raises QueryTimeoutException.

nodes.title: Livewire screens: create data source, test, introspect, view schema
nodes.description: Flux-based Livewire pages: list data sources, create wizard (per-driver fields), Test button, Introspect button, schema browser tree.
nodes.acceptance: Manual: end-to-end create → test → introspect flow works for Postgres + MySQL.

nodes.title: docker-compose Postgres + MySQL for integration tests (§18.3)
nodes.description: tests/docker-compose.yml with seeded Postgres + MySQL; Pest test base class that boots containers and points test DataSource rows at them.
nodes.acceptance: CI job runs the integration suite green.

nodes.title: Semantic DTOs: SemanticQuery, SemanticResult, ProviderContext, TimeDimension, Filter (§5)
nodes.description: final readonly DTOs per §5.1-5.3. Constructor-promoted; immutable; JsonSerializable. Filter has field/operator/value (+ value_from_context for access policies).
nodes.acceptance: All DTOs land; SemanticQuery serializes/deserializes deterministically for cache-key hashing.

nodes.title: CreateSemanticModel action + model repository
nodes.description: Persists analytics_semantic_models row tied to a semantic provider (and through it, optionally a data source). SemanticModelRepository::findForQuery(orgId, modelName) loads the full graph (model + measures + dimensions + joins + policies).
nodes.acceptance: Pest: create model + verify findForQuery hydrates all related entities once.

nodes.title: AddMeasureToModel + measure type validation
nodes.description: Validates: type ∈ {count, count_distinct, sum, avg, min, max, ratio}; column required for column-aggregates; expression.numerator+denominator required for ratio; calculated metrics reference existing measures only (NO arbitrary SQL — plan §4.5).
nodes.acceptance: Negative tests: bad type, missing column for sum, ratio without operands, arbitrary SQL in expression — all rejected with typed exceptions.

nodes.title: AddDimensionToModel + time-dimension grains
nodes.description: Validates type ∈ {string, number, boolean, time}; time dimensions require allowed_time_grains ⊆ {day, week, month, quarter, year}.
nodes.acceptance: Negative tests for invalid grains/types.

nodes.title: AddJoinToModel — explicit, prefer many_to_one
nodes.description: Persists analytics_joins. Warns on one_to_many; rejects cycles between joins (per §17.1 fanout mitigation). V1 strongly biases many_to_one fact→dimension.
nodes.acceptance: Pest: one_to_many produces a warning surface; cycle-introducing join is rejected.

nodes.title: AddAccessPolicy action — value_from_context rules only in V1
nodes.description: V1 supports rules of the form `{field, operator ∈ {=, in}, value_from_context}` (per §4.8 / §17.2). No DSL beyond this in V1 (§21).
nodes.acceptance: Pest: rule with arbitrary SQL or unsupported operator is rejected.

nodes.title: ValidateSemanticModel action — pre-execution structural check
nodes.description: Walks the loaded model and asserts: base_table set, every measure references a defined column (or known measure for ratios), every dimension column belongs to a defined join alias or base table, every join target exists, at least one is_required access policy when model is enabled for embedding.
nodes.acceptance: Negative test cases for each invariant.

nodes.title: Livewire: model + measure + dimension + join + policy editors
nodes.description: Plan §13.1 MeasureEditor as the template; extend to dimensions, joins, policies. Uses Flux form components; alpha_dash validation on names.
nodes.acceptance: Manual: build a complete orders model from scratch in the UI.

nodes.title: Preview semantic query in builder (uses real pipeline)
nodes.description: Builder button runs a small SemanticQuery via the same RunSemanticQuery action used in embed mode, returning ≤100 rows. Confirms 'preview uses the same query pipeline as embed mode' (§14.3 M5 exit criteria).
nodes.acceptance: Preview button returns rows for a valid model; rejected with typed error for invalid one.

nodes.title: SqlDialect interface (§8.3)
nodes.description: Per §8.3: quoteIdentifier, dateTrunc(grain,expr), limitOffset(?int,?int), aggregate(type,expr), placeholder(position). SqlDialectResolver::forDataSource(DataSource) returns the right dialect by driver.
nodes.acceptance: Interface compiles; resolver covers postgres/mysql/warehouse.

nodes.title: PostgresDialect
nodes.description: Verbatim from §8.3: "-quoted identifiers (with "" escape), DATE_TRUNC('grain', expr), LIMIT/OFFSET, COUNT/SUM/AVG/MIN/MAX/COUNT(DISTINCT), '?' placeholder.
nodes.acceptance: Snapshot tests per §18.2 lock the generated SQL for canonical cases.

nodes.title: MySqlDialect (no DATE_TRUNC — use DATE_FORMAT/equivalent)
nodes.description: Backtick-quote identifiers; emulate DATE_TRUNC via DATE_FORMAT for each supported grain or use DATE_SUB(... INTERVAL ...) tricks. Document the chosen approach in design notes.
nodes.design: Recommended: a small per-grain mapping returning a TRUNCATE-equivalent expression. Avoid MySQL 8 window/CTE features in V1 for compatibility.
nodes.acceptance: Snapshot tests for all 5 grains; aggregates match Postgres dialect output shape.

nodes.title: Warehouse dialect (BigQuery OR Snowflake per m2-warehouse-decision)
nodes.description: If BigQuery: backtick identifiers, DATE_TRUNC(DATE(expr), DAY|WEEK|...) per §8.3. If Snowflake: "-quoted identifiers, DATE_TRUNC('grain', expr).
nodes.acceptance: Snapshot tests for 5 grains + aggregates.

nodes.title: FieldValidator — semantic-field allowlist before compile
nodes.description: Validates every measure/dimension/filter field in SemanticQuery exists on the loaded SemanticModel and is is_public (or whitelisted). Raises UnknownSemanticFieldException / FieldNotPublicException before any SQL is generated.
nodes.acceptance: Pest: unknown field → typed exception; private field requested by an embed token → rejected.

nodes.title: AccessPolicyCompiler — bind tenant context as parameters
nodes.description: Compiles is_required access policies into (sql, bindings) where context values (e.g., external_account_id) are appended to bindings, never string-concatenated (§4.8). Returns ['', []] when no required policies.
nodes.acceptance: Pest: tenant rule emits 'orders.account_id = ?' and binds the context value; SQL never contains the raw value.

nodes.title: InternalQueryCompiler::compile (§8.4)
nodes.description: Implement the §8.4 reference compiler: SELECT (dimensions + time dimension dateTrunc + measure aggregates) FROM base_table AS alias JOIN... WHERE (filters AND access_policy) GROUP BY (dimensions + time-trunc expr) LIMIT/OFFSET. Returns CompiledQuery(sql, bindings, dialect, metadata).
nodes.acceptance: Snapshot tests for: revenue by country; revenue by month + country with tenant policy; ratio measure (avg_order_value).

nodes.title: InternalSemanticProvider (§7) — implements SemanticProvider
nodes.description: Per §7: load model, FieldValidator, compile via InternalQueryCompiler, resolve connector via DataSourceConnectorManager, return SemanticResult. listModels/listFields hit SemanticModelRepository. capabilities() returns supportsExternalModels=false + dialect-derived time grains.
nodes.acceptance: End-to-end test against docker Postgres returns expected rows for the revenue-by-country canonical query.

nodes.title: Per-dialect SQL snapshot test suite (§18.2)
nodes.description: Pest snapshot tests covering: each aggregate, each time grain, tenant policy injection, ratio measure, joined dimension. Run per dialect.
nodes.acceptance: Snapshot files committed; CI fails on accidental SQL drift.

nodes.title: CreateDashboard / AddChartToDashboard / PublishDashboard
nodes.description: Action triplet. AddChartToDashboard persists a Chart + ChartQuery (the SemanticQuery JSON) + ChartLayout. PublishDashboard flips is_published and validates every chart's SemanticQuery passes FieldValidator.
nodes.acceptance: Pest: published dashboard fails fast if any chart references a missing field.

nodes.title: Chart type registry: number_card, bar_chart, line_chart, table
nodes.description: Server-side ChartType registry: declares required SemanticResult shape (e.g., number_card → 1 measure, 0 dimensions; bar_chart → ≥1 dimension + ≥1 measure). Used by chart builder validation and runtime renderer adapters.
nodes.acceptance: ChartType::validate(SemanticResult) returns typed errors for shape mismatches.

nodes.title: Livewire: dashboard list/CRUD/preview + chart CRUD
nodes.description: Dashboard pages with chart-add modal, simple grid layout, preview button. Layout persists to analytics_chart_layouts.
nodes.acceptance: Manual: build a 4-chart dashboard, preview, edit a chart's measure, layout survives reload.

nodes.title: Dashboard preview reuses embed query pipeline
nodes.description: Preview routes go through the same QueryExecutionPipeline as embeds — same FieldValidator, AccessPolicyCompiler, cache. Difference: ProviderContext is built from the authenticated org user, not an embed token.
nodes.acceptance: Field disallowed by embed is also rejected in preview.

nodes.title: EmbedTokenPayload DTO + claims schema (§11.1)
nodes.description: Claims: iss, sub, organization_id, project_id, embed_id, external_account_id, allowed_dashboard_ids[], allowed_model_names[], filters{}, theme{}, iat, exp. Strict toClaims/fromClaims round-trip with required-field validation.
nodes.acceptance: Pest: missing required claim → InvalidEmbedTokenException.

nodes.title: EmbedTokenManager — generate/decode HS256 JWT (§11.2)
nodes.description: Verbatim §11.2. firebase/php-jwt; key from config('embedlayer.embed_signing_key'); decode wraps Throwable as InvalidEmbedTokenException.
nodes.acceptance: Pest: tampered signature → InvalidEmbedTokenException; expired exp → InvalidEmbedTokenException.

nodes.title: GenerateEmbedToken action — validate against saved Embed config
nodes.description: Action takes embed_id + external_account_id + filters + theme; cross-checks allowed_dashboard_ids/model_names against the persisted Embed row (per §11.3: 'token claims are not trusted blindly').
nodes.acceptance: Pest: token request asking for a dashboard not owned by the embed → rejected before signing.

nodes.title: ResolveEmbedContext — build ProviderContext from token
nodes.description: Decodes token, hydrates ProviderContext (organizationId, projectId, externalAccountId, embedId, claims). Reads the Embed row and intersects token claims with persisted config.
nodes.acceptance: Pest: token claim 'allowed_dashboard_ids' that drifts from DB → rejected.

nodes.title: Allowed-origin enforcement (CORS + Referer/Origin check) on embed routes
nodes.description: Middleware compares request Origin/Referer against analytics_embed_domains for the embed. Reject with 403 on mismatch. (§18.4 'invalid domain' test must pass.)
nodes.acceptance: Pest: request with wrong Origin → 403.

nodes.title: GET /embed/dashboards/{id} — iframe entry point
nodes.description: Validates token (query string), renders blade shell that boots the Svelte runtime (m7) with the dashboard payload preloaded. Inline CSP that restricts framing to allowed domains.
nodes.acceptance: Manual: <iframe src=...?token=...> renders a dashboard.

nodes.title: Embed API: GET /api/embed/dashboards/{id} + POST .../charts/{id}/query
nodes.description: Bearer-token auth middleware uses ResolveEmbedContext. Endpoints return DashboardPayload and ChartResultPayload per §2.4. Never returns SQL, credentials, or provider type.
nodes.acceptance: Pest: response JSON shape matches §2.4 exactly; no leaked fields.

nodes.title: QueryExecutionPipeline + all pipes (§10)
nodes.description: Laravel Pipeline order from §10: ValidateEmbedToken → ResolveTenantContext → ResolveDashboardContext → ValidateQueryPermissions → ApplyAccessPolicies → ResolveSemanticProvider → CheckCache → ExecuteSemanticQuery → NormalizeResult → StoreResultCache. SemanticQueryRequest payload per §10.
nodes.acceptance: Pest: a failure in any pipe short-circuits with the right exception class.

nodes.title: ValidateQueryPermissions pipe — disallowed-field guard
nodes.description: Per §10 sample. For every measure & dimension in the request, dashboard.allowsMeasure/allowsDimension must be true; else UnauthorizedSemanticFieldException. Allowed lists come from the Chart row, not the token.
nodes.acceptance: Pest: chart-configured measures only; injected extra fields blocked.

nodes.title: ApplyAccessPolicies pipe — server-side tenant filter injection
nodes.description: Append required access policies as Filters on the SemanticQuery (so they flow through the compiler with bindings). Plan §17.2 'never depend only on frontend filters'.
nodes.acceptance: Pest: missing tenant context with is_required policy → MissingTenantContextException.

nodes.title: NormalizeResult pipe — provider-agnostic column/row shape
nodes.description: Coerces SemanticResult into the canonical {columns:[{key,label,type}], rows:[{k:v}]} shape from §2.4. Annotates metadata with provider_type, cache_hit, query_time_ms — but never with SQL or credentials.
nodes.acceptance: Pest: result JSON matches §2.4 shape; no metadata leakage.

nodes.title: Embed security test suite (§18.4)
nodes.description: Pest scenarios: expired token, invalid signature, unauthorized dashboard, missing tenant context, disallowed field, invalid domain, valid token success.
nodes.acceptance: All seven scenarios green; failing assertions block deploy.

nodes.title: Scaffold packages/embed-runtime (Vite + Svelte + TS)
nodes.description: Per §12. packages/embed-runtime with src/index.ts, components/, api/, charts/adapters/, types/. Vite library mode build → dist/embed.js consumable by both iframe shell and (later) host pages.
nodes.acceptance: npm run build emits embed.js; bundle size budget recorded (target <100KB gzipped initially).

nodes.title: TypeScript types: DashboardPayload, ChartResultPayload, SemanticQuery, Filter
nodes.description: Mirror the Laravel API response shapes from §2.4 and §6. Single source of truth for runtime; later generate from a backend OpenAPI spec.
nodes.acceptance: tsc --strict passes; runtime never sees provider-specific fields.

nodes.title: EmbedLayerApiClient (§12.3) with retry/error policy
nodes.description: loadDashboard(id) and runChartQuery(dashId, chartId, filters). Token in Authorization header. Surfaces typed errors to onError host callback (V2) and to default error boundary.
nodes.acceptance: Vitest: 401 → AuthError; 5xx → RuntimeError; 200 → typed payload.

nodes.title: EmbedLayerDashboard.svelte — loader + layout
nodes.description: Loads dashboard, fans out chart queries in parallel, renders ChartRenderer per chart, listens to FilterBar changes, debounces refetch.
nodes.acceptance: Manual: full dashboard renders with all four chart types.

nodes.title: ChartRenderer + adapters: NumberCard, BarChart, LineChart, TableChart
nodes.description: One adapter per chart type. Lightweight charting (D3 primitives or layercake) — avoid heavy chart libs in V1. Adapter signature: (columns, rows, options) → mounted Svelte component.
nodes.acceptance: Visual test: each adapter renders correctly with seeded payloads.

nodes.title: FilterBar.svelte + filter state store
nodes.description: Date-range + categorical filters; emits SemanticQuery-compatible filter objects to the dashboard component. Filter state persisted in URL hash for shareable iframe links.
nodes.acceptance: Filter change refetches affected charts only.

nodes.title: Loading skeletons + error boundaries per chart
nodes.description: Each chart shows skeleton during fetch, error card on failure (one chart's failure must not break the dashboard — same isolation principle as §16.5).
nodes.acceptance: Manual: simulate a 500 on one chart; rest of dashboard still renders.

nodes.title: iframe bundle wiring + CDN deployment path
nodes.description: Vite build outputs to public/embed/embed.js (served by Laravel) for V1; document CDN path for V2 (cdn.embedlayer.com).
nodes.acceptance: Iframe at /embed/dashboards/{id}?token=... renders without external network requests beyond the Laravel API.

nodes.title: QueryCacheKey::make (§14.2) — tenant-aware sha256
nodes.description: Verbatim §14.2: hash(sha256, json_encode({organization_id, project_id, external_account_id, chart_id, query})). Document JSON canonicalization (sorted keys) so equivalent queries hash identically.
nodes.acceptance: Pest: equivalent SemanticQueries with reordered fields hash to the same key.

nodes.title: CheckCache + StoreResultCache pipes
nodes.description: CheckCache: if hit and !expired, populate SemanticQueryRequest::$result + cacheHit=true and short-circuit. StoreResultCache: on miss, persist result + expires_at = now+TTL. Per-chart TTL falls back to config default.
nodes.acceptance: Pest: cold path stores, warm path hits within TTL, post-TTL re-fetches.

nodes.title: Persist analytics_query_runs from the pipeline (§19)
nodes.description: After ExecuteSemanticQuery / on exception, write a query_runs row: provider_type, model_name, dashboard_id, chart_id, status, duration_ms, cache_hit, query_shape (NO bindings), error_message (sanitized).
nodes.acceptance: Pest: success/failed/timeout/cache_hit cases all produce a row with the right status.

nodes.title: Livewire screen: recent query runs (per org)
nodes.description: Read-only operator screen showing recent runs with filters by dashboard, status, provider_type. Useful for V1 debugging.
nodes.acceptance: Manual: screen lists runs and links to the dashboard/chart.

nodes.title: Docs: read-only DB user setup per supported driver
nodes.description: README-style doc giving the exact GRANT / role for Postgres, MySQL, and the chosen warehouse so customers connect with least privilege (§17.4).

nodes.title: Credential rotation support in CredentialVault + Livewire flow
nodes.description: Rotate-key action re-encrypts every encrypted_config row with a new key, with safe rollback. Surface a 'Rotate credentials' control on the data source detail page.
nodes.acceptance: Pest: rotation re-encrypts all rows; old key can no longer decrypt.

nodes.title: Sanitize sensitive query bindings out of logs and query_runs
nodes.description: Per §17.4 'avoid logging SQL bindings if they contain sensitive values' + §19 'do not store raw sensitive query bindings'. Add a redaction filter pass on logger context.
nodes.acceptance: Pest: simulated query with binding 'acct_456' never appears in storage/logs.*

nodes.title: V2: <embed-layer-dashboard/> web component runtime (§15.2)
nodes.description: Move beyond iframe-only: custom element registration, shadow DOM/scoped styles, responsive height, global + chart-level filters, drilldown events, host callbacks (onFilterChange, onChartClick, onError), theme tokens, loading skeletons, error boundaries.

nodes.title: V2: CubeSemanticProvider adapter (§15.3)
nodes.description: Implement SemanticProvider over Cube REST. CubeFieldMapper translates SemanticQuery↔Cube query. Cube remains source-of-truth for Cube-backed models; cache metadata only.

nodes.title: V2: DbtSemanticLayerProvider adapter (§15.4)
nodes.description: SemanticProvider over dbt Semantic Layer GraphQL. Map internal model concept ↔ metric namespace; metric ↔ measure; dimension ↔ dimension; filter ↔ where/group-by constraint.

nodes.title: V2: cache warming, SWR, per-chart/provider TTL, invalidation (§15.5)
V2: model + dashboard versioning + publish workflow (§15.6)
nodes.description: Add analytics_semantic_model_versions + analytics_dashboard_versions; dashboards pin to a published model version so model edits don't break customer-facing embeds.

nodes.title: V3: AI-assisted semantic model creation (§16.2)
nodes.description: AI suggests measures/dimensions/labels from schema introspection. Output is structured JSON; human reviews; validation stays deterministic; AI cannot publish production models.

nodes.title: V3: natural-language → SemanticQuery (§16.3)
nodes.description: NL compiles to SemanticQuery, NEVER to SQL. Routed through the standard pipeline so governance applies.

nodes.title: V3: pre-aggregations / summary tables (§16.4)
nodes.description: Pre-aggregation definitions; per-dialect CREATE TABLE AS / materialized views; refresh jobs; query planner chooses aggregate when compatible.

nodes.title: V3: multi-provider dashboards (§16.5)
nodes.description: Dashboard can combine charts from internal + Cube + dbt SL. Provider-aware chart config, cross-provider filter normalization, per-provider cache, error isolation — one chart's failure must not break the dashboard.
